item.title: Why does my brain need subtitles?
item.description: Struggling to follow dialogue without captions? Learn how auditory processing differences and modern sound mixing make subtitles a necessity for many viewers.

media:content.media:title: Why does my brain need subtitles?
media:content.media:description: Struggling to follow dialogue without captions? Learn how auditory processing differences and modern sound mixing make subtitles a necessity for many viewers.

item.title: Why can’t my brain just start?
item.description: Feeling anxious or frozen by a simple checklist is a common sign of task paralysis. Explore the psychological reasons behind productivity dread and learn practical ways to get started.

media:content.media:title: Why can’t my brain just start?
media:content.media:description: Feeling anxious or frozen by a simple checklist is a common sign of task paralysis. Explore the psychological reasons behind productivity dread and learn practical ways to get started.

item.title: Tips for staying focused on tasks
item.description: A short look at why staying focused can be challenging and simple ways to support attention during everyday tasks.

media:content.media:title: Tips for staying focused on tasks
media:content.media:description: A short look at why staying focused can be challenging and simple ways to support attention during everyday tasks.

item.title: Scientists Find ADHD Is Mostly Genetic
item.description: A look at research suggesting ADHD has a strong genetic component, based on the source title and description.

media:content.media:title: Scientists Find ADHD Is Mostly Genetic
media:content.media:description: A look at research suggesting ADHD has a strong genetic component, based on the source title and description.

item.title: When your brain feels overwhelmed
item.description: Cognitive overload happens when your brain gets flooded with more information than it can process. Discover why you feel overwhelmed and practical techniques to help reset your focus.

media:content.media:title: When your brain feels overwhelmed
media:content.media:description: Cognitive overload happens when your brain gets flooded with more information than it can process. Discover why you feel overwhelmed and practical techniques to help reset your focus.

item.title: Why laundry starts 7 side quests
item.description: High temperatures force your body to expend extra energy trying to cool down, which can drain your cognitive resources. Discover the science behind heat-induced brain fog.

media:content.media:title: Why laundry starts 7 side quests
media:content.media:description: High temperatures force your body to expend extra energy trying to cool down, which can drain your cognitive resources. Discover the science behind heat-induced brain fog.

item.title: Why does this feel calming and awful?
item.description: A brief look at mixed feelings and how the brain can send conflicting signals.

media:content.media:title: Why does this feel calming and awful?
media:content.media:description: A brief look at mixed feelings and how the brain can send conflicting signals.

item.title: Why RSD Can Feel So Exhausting
item.description: Rejection Sensitive Dysphoria (RSD) causes intense reactions to perceived criticism. Learn why navigating this constant hypervigilance can lead to profound mental and physical exhaustion.

media:content.media:title: Why RSD Can Feel So Exhausting
media:content.media:description: Rejection Sensitive Dysphoria (RSD) causes intense reactions to perceived criticism. Learn why navigating this constant hypervigilance can lead to profound mental and physical exhaustion.

item.title: A quiet reset after a busy week
item.description: If you need to step away for a minute after masking all week, this is your sign.

media:content.media:title: A quiet reset after a busy week
media:content.media:description: If you need to step away for a minute after masking all week, this is your sign.

item.title: A Doctor’s ADHD and Medical School Journey
item.description: A medical student shares the experience of nearly facing academic dismissal due to unmanaged ADHD, and the practical strategies used to overcome these severe hurdles and succeed.

media:content.media:title: A Doctor’s ADHD and Medical School Journey
media:content.media:description: A medical student shares the experience of nearly facing academic dismissal due to unmanaged ADHD, and the practical strategies used to overcome these severe hurdles and succeed.

item.title: Why alarms still don’t save my day
item.description: Sometimes the problem is how time feels, not whether I set the alarm.

media:content.media:title: Why alarms still don’t save my day
media:content.media:description: Sometimes the problem is how time feels, not whether I set the alarm.

item.title: 10 Questions to Ask Yourself About ADHD
item.description: A concise look at 10 questions to help you reflect on ADHD and better understand your symptoms.

media:content.media:title: 10 Questions to Ask Yourself About ADHD
media:content.media:description: A concise look at 10 questions to help you reflect on ADHD and better understand your symptoms.

item.title: Is this a BFRB or just picking?
item.description: Understand the difference between occasional skin picking and a Body-Focused Repetitive Behavior (BFRB). Learn the signs, impacts, and how professionals distinguish the two.

media:content.media:title: Is this a BFRB or just picking?
media:content.media:description: Understand the difference between occasional skin picking and a Body-Focused Repetitive Behavior (BFRB). Learn the signs, impacts, and how professionals distinguish the two.

item.title: Why Criticism Can Feel Hard With ADHD
item.description: ADHD can affect how the brain processes negative feedback and perceived rejection. Explore the science behind this intense emotional response and learn practical management tips.

media:content.media:title: Why Criticism Can Feel Hard With ADHD
media:content.media:description: ADHD can affect how the brain processes negative feedback and perceived rejection. Explore the science behind this intense emotional response and learn practical management tips.

item.title: Why heat can make your brain feel foggy
item.description: Hot weather can affect concentration, energy levels, and mental clarity. Learn why heat can leave your brain feeling sluggish and what may help you stay focused when temperatures rise.

media:content.media:title: Why heat can make your brain feel foggy
media:content.media:description: Hot weather can affect concentration, energy levels, and mental clarity. Learn why heat can leave your brain feeling sluggish and what may help you stay focused when temperatures rise.

item.title: The planner thing is not that simple
item.description: A relatable take on why planning can feel more complicated than it seems.

media:content.media:title: The planner thing is not that simple
media:content.media:description: A relatable take on why planning can feel more complicated than it seems.

item.title: Why does everything hit so hard?
item.description: A relatable look at feeling things deeply, with a reminder that if this feels familiar, you’re not imagining it.

media:content.media:title: Why does everything hit so hard?
media:content.media:description: A relatable look at feeling things deeply, with a reminder that if this feels familiar, you’re not imagining it.

item.title: Do What You Have to Do First
item.description: A simple reminder to keep going with the work in front of you until you can do what you want to do.

media:content.media:title: Do What You Have to Do First
media:content.media:description: A simple reminder to keep going with the work in front of you until you can do what you want to do.

item.title: ADHD Basics: Start Here
item.description: Discover the core facts about ADHD. This brief guide breaks down common signs, how it impacts daily focus, and standard approaches to managing symptoms.

media:content.media:title: ADHD Basics: Start Here
media:content.media:description: Discover the core facts about ADHD. This brief guide breaks down common signs, how it impacts daily focus, and standard approaches to managing symptoms.

item.title: Why this audio hits so hard
item.description: A lighthearted take on how a familiar audio clip can feel especially relatable for people with ADHD.

media:content.media:title: Why this audio hits so hard
media:content.media:description: A lighthearted take on how a familiar audio clip can feel especially relatable for people with ADHD.
